title: Ancient golden helmet recovered more than a year after Dutch heist
summary_full: The helmet and three golden bracelets were stolen in January 2025, but one bracelet is yet to be found.
summary_public: The helmet and three golden bracelets were stolen in January 2025, but one bracelet is yet to be found.
